name: Tahmina Watson
title: Founder & Immigration Attorney
bio:
Tahmina Watson is the founder of Watson Immigration Law and one of the most recognized immigration attorneys in the United States. With over 15 years of experience, she has built a reputation as a fierce advocate for entrepreneurs, investors, and businesses navigating U.S. immigration law.

Tahmina is the author of four books on immigration, including The Startup Visa (now in its second edition), which has become an essential resource for founders and immigration professionals worldwide. She hosts the Tahmina Talks Immigration® podcast, where she interviews thought leaders, policymakers, and innovators at the intersection of immigration and entrepreneurship.

She has been featured in The New York Times, Forbes, Bloomberg, The Guardian, CNN, NPR, The Washington Post, The Seattle Times, and Business Insider. A Forbes Business Council Member and Puget Sound Business Journal Women of Influence honoree, Tahmina is a tireless advocate for immigration reform and a startup visa for international founders.
